ranked_movies.title: Pride and Prejudice
ranked_movies.reason: Extremely high frequency of mentions across multiple threads, consistently praised for its romantic tension, yearning male lead (Mr. Darcy), and classic, well-executed story. Recommended in both 'romance movies when a man is yearning' and 'good romance movies' threads.

ranked_movies.title: The Princess Bride
ranked_movies.reason: A perennial favorite mentioned in multiple threads ('comedy romance', 'sweet and fluffy', 'date night'). Universally loved for its blend of romance, comedy, and adventure, making it a safe and highly recommended choice.

ranked_movies.title: Notting Hill
ranked_movies.reason: Specifically recommended in the 'yearning' thread and listed among top rom-coms. Known for its charming leads and heartwarming story, it's a staple of the genre.

ranked_movies.title: The Holiday
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested in requests for 'sweet and fluffy' and 'date night' movies. Celebrated for its cozy, feel-good atmosphere and dual romantic storylines.

ranked_movies.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
ranked_movies.reason: A classic modern rom-com mentioned in multiple suggestion threads ('comedy romance', 'sweet and fluffy', 'date night'). Loved for its chemistry, wit, and modern Shakespearean adaptation.

ranked_movies.title: While You Were Sleeping
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended in the 'sweet and fluffy' thread, with multiple users specifically calling it out. Praised for its warm, comforting, and humorous take on romance.

ranked_movies.title: Serendipity
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the 'yearning' thread and listed among top romantic comedies. Its theme of fate and longing resonates strongly with fans of the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Stardust
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a 'sweet and fluffy' option that blends romance, comedy, and fantasy. Its unique charm and adventurous spirit make it a standout recommendation.

ranked_movies.title: Kate & Leopold
ranked_movies.reason: Explicitly mentioned in the 'yearning' thread ('Hugh Jackman is a great yearner') and recommended for date nights. Known for its fish-out-of-water charm and romantic leads.

ranked_movies.title: Amelie
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as a 'foreign romance' and for 'date night'. Its whimsical, creative, and deeply romantic story makes it a unique and beloved film.

ranked_movies.title: North & South
ranked_movies.reason: Heavily recommended in the 'yearning' thread, with users stating 'Mr. Thornton practically invented yearning!' This miniseries is a benchmark for romantic period dramas.

ranked_movies.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love
ranked_movies.reason: Listed in multiple threads for 'comedy romance' and 'date night'. Its clever writing, ensemble cast, and heartfelt moments make it a modern favorite.

ranked_movies.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
ranked_movies.reason: A frequently mentioned rom-com in 'sweet and fluffy' and 'date night' threads. Its high-concept premise and chemistry between leads keep it popular.

ranked_movies.title: Before Sunrise
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the 'yearning' thread and suggested for meaningful date nights. The entire trilogy is praised for its deep, realistic, and profound exploration of love and connection.

ranked_movies.title: Ever After
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a 'sweet and fluffy' Cinderella adaptation. Its strength and charm make it a enduringly popular romantic fairytale.

ranked_movies.title: You've Got Mail
ranked_movies.reason: A top recommendation in the 'comedy romance' and 'sweet and fluffy' threads. Its cozy, nostalgic take on modern romance resonates with many.

ranked_movies.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a 'good romance' and a 'sweet and fluffy' film. Its cultural humor and heartfelt story make it a universally appealing rom-com.

ranked_movies.title: 13 Going on 30
ranked_movies.reason: Called a 'favorite romcom' in the 'sweet and fluffy' thread. Its fun premise and charming performance by Jennifer Garner make it a beloved rewatch.

ranked_movies.title: Leap Year
ranked_movies.reason: Multiple recommendations for having a 'rainy comforting warm hug kinda vibe'. A go-to for a light, travel-based romantic comedy.

ranked_movies.title: The Proposal
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned alongside other top rom-coms. The chemistry between Ryan Reynolds and Sandra Bullock and its fun premise keep it in high regard.
